summary: Comprehensive testing completed for PHARMA-AI Formulation Optimizer with new SMILES-primary features. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI operational, with one minor backend logic issue identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Known drug analysis (Ibuprofen) incorrectly returns is_experimental=true when it should be false
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic - affects UI badge display but doesn't break functionality
minor_bugs.evidence: Backend test shows Aspirin correctly returns is_experimental=false, but Ibuprofen analysis shows experimental badge

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: Root endpoint (/api/) returns 200
✅ Backend API: Get all drugs (/api/drugs) returns 30 drugs
✅ Backend API: Get single drug (/api/drugs/Aspirin) returns 200
✅ Backend API: Aspirin with SMILES returns is_experimental=false, drug_name=Aspirin
✅ Backend API: Experimental SMILES only returns is_experimental=true, drug_name='Experimental Compound'
✅ Backend API: Missing SMILES returns 422 validation error
✅ Backend API: All 4 panels contain natural_language_summary
✅ Backend API: molecule_overview section complete with required keys
✅ Backend API: Get all analyses and specific analysis working
✅ Frontend UI: Landing page loads with SMILES textarea as PRIMARY input
✅ Frontend UI: Mode toggle buttons (Enter SMILES Manually / Pick from Database) working
✅ Frontend UI: Database search for Aspirin shows dropdown with auto-fill SMILES
✅ Frontend UI: 3 experimental example buttons visible and clickable
✅ Frontend UI: Optional drug name and dose fields present
✅ Frontend UI: Analysis submission with experimental SMILES works
✅ Analysis Page: EXPERIMENTAL badge displays for experimental compounds
✅ Analysis Page: Molecule Overview banner with key structural features
✅ Analysis Page: All 4 analysis panels (Solubility, Excipient, Stability, PK) present
✅ Analysis Page: Natural Language Summary blocks in all 4 panels with italic text
✅ Analysis Page: PDF export button visible and clickable
✅ Database functionality: Ibuprofen search, selection, SMILES auto-fill working

success_percentage.integration: 95% (frontend-backend integration working with minor backend issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix backend logic in /api/analyze endpoint: Known drugs selected from database (like Ibuprofen) should return is_experimental=false instead of true. The SMILES matching logic may need adjustment to properly detect known drugs.
